title: chromolaena cylindrocephala
intro: Chromolaena cylindrocephala, also known as the cylindrical Eupatorium or bushy Joe Pye weed, is a plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Chromolaena cylindrocephala include the treatment of fever, colds, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a diuretic and to relieve digestive problems. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to extract its medicinal properties.
